タイ首都のバーで火災、少なくとも27人死亡 重体22人含む60人超負傷
jp.description: タイ首都バンコクの人気エリア、チャトチャック地区にあるバーで12日遅く、火災が発生し、少なくとも27人が死亡、重体22人を含む60人超が負傷した。

jp.title: 【↓】日経平均 大引け｜ 3日ぶり反落、韓国株急落で一気に値を崩す (7月13日)
jp.description: 前週末の米国市場では、ＮＹダウは前日比１４９ドル高と続伸した。原油価格の下落やＳＫハイニックス＜ＳＫＨＹ＞の米市場上場が投資家心理を改善させた。　週明けの東京市場では、半導体関連の主力株などが売られ・・・。

jp.title: （まとめ）日経平均は1,315円安の67,242円で3営業日ぶりに反落 中東情勢などリスクオフから売りに
jp.description: 東京市場まとめ1.概況日経平均は147円安の68,410円と下落して取引を開始しました。中東情勢の緊迫化を受け、原油先物が急伸したことなどからリスク回避の売りが先行しました。その後、日経平均は上昇に転じる場面も見られましたが、韓国市場でAI・半導体関連株が大きく....

jp.title: イギリス猛暑、5月と6月の熱波で2700人以上死亡の可能性 研究チームが推定
jp.description: 5月と6月にイギリスを襲った異常な猛暑により、2700人以上が熱中症で死亡した可能性がある。 インペリアル・コレッジ・ロンドン、イギリス気象庁、ロンドン大学衛生熱帯医学大学院の研究チームが13日、推計を発表した。極端な暑さの危険性に関する、既知の情報に基づいているという。

jp.description: 「Obsidianは昔とは変わった」という意見にディレクターが反論。

world.title: Shidiye Commits to Campaign for Kenya-Somalia Border Reopening
world.description: Garissa gubernatorial aspirant pledges to lobby President Ruto to reopen frontier, citing reduced Al-Shabaab threat and economic gains for Northeastern Kenya.

world.title: Counter terrorism police take over investigation into Ann Widdecombe's death
world.description: The man in custody has since been re-arrested on suspicion of commission, preparation or instigation of acts of terrorism, police say.

world.title: Suspect in Ann Widdecombe murder seen on CCTV getting into car with object
world.description: The man, dressed in a white shirt and shorts, can be seen getting into a red car outside a house in Rotherham in the footage.

world.title: Telok Blangah resident burns incense, uses fan to ward off foul smell from neighbour's unit
world.description: For over a year, residents at a Telok Blangah block have been dealing with a foul smell coming from an elderly neighbour's home, with one resorting to using fans and burning incense in the corridor to mask the odour.Wang (transliteration), 70, who lives on the 11th floor of Block 13 Telok Blangah Crescent, told Shin Min Daily News that she...

world.title: France vs Spain: World Cup semifinal - Mbappe, Yamal, predictions, kickoff
world.description: Kylian Mbappe’s France continue their quest for the world title, facing Lamine Yamal’s Spain in a blockbuster semifinal.

world.title: ‘He's not funny to me’ - Kiekie names Mr Macaroni in resurfaced clip about colleagues she doesn't find funny
world.description: A clip from a six-month-old interview featuring content creator and comedian Kiekie has resurfaced online, drawing fresh attention after she named fellow skit maker Mr Macaroni as someone whose comedy has never made her laugh. Read more.

world.title: Sarawak to get first Gardenia bread manufacturing facility in 2027
world.description: KUCHING (July 13): Sarawak is set to establish its first Gardenia bread manufacturing facility after Kim Teck Cheong Consolidated Berhad and Sanjung Etika Sdn Bhd signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to establish Gardenia Bakeries (Sarawak) Sdn Bhd. The RM30 million investment at the Samarahan Industrial Park is expected to create up to 500 jobRead More

world.title: Nakuru Town MP Gikaria snubs IEBC, summoned to appear in person
world.description: IEBC has summoned Nakuru Town West MP David Gikaria to appear before the commission at exactly 1.30pm today after he failed to appear at 9am on Monday morning.

world.title: WSIS Forum 2026 closes with call to turn digital commitments into action
world.description: WSIS Forum 2026 concluded with a call to turn digital commitments into measurable action, as leaders urged governments and stakeholders to make the coming decade one of implementation focused on digital inclusion, responsible AI, and improving people's lives.

world.title: Emirates Airline Appoints First Emirati Female Captains Hanan Jawad and Bakhita Al Mheiri
world.description: Emirates has appointed Captain Hanan Jawad and Captain Bakhita Al Mheiri as its first female Emirati captains, marking a historic milestone for women in aviation.
